channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Watch: Stew Leonard Jr. on celebrating July 4 without overspending
item.description: The president and CEO of Stew Leonard's offers tips for keeping your holiday meal costs low.

item.title: Watch: Descendants of Presidents McKinley and Hoover discuss their famous relatives
item.description: Relatives of former U.S. presidents share insights on how their family members shaped history.

item.title: Trump receives expensive ring from Belgian diamond group that secured tariff relief
item.description: The gift follows Belgium's diamond industry obtaining removal of U.S. tariffs on diamond imports.

item.title: WATCH: The story behind Lady Liberty
item.description: Jesse Brackenbury, CEO of The Statue of Liberty and Ellis Island Foundation, speaks with ABC News Live about the iconic monument's historical importance.
